name: INVESTORS TITLE CO
summary: Investors Title Company is a North Carolina holding company primarily engaged in issuing residential and commercial title insurance through subsidiaries ITIC and NITIC. It also provides tax-deferred real property exchange services via ITEC and ITAC, management services to title insurance agencies through ITMS, and investment management and trust services through Investors Trust Company.

products.name: Residential and Commercial Title Insurance
products.description: Title insurance policies for property owners and mortgage lenders issued directly and through agents under ALTA standard forms.

products.name: Tax-Deferred Exchange Services
products.description: Like-kind property exchange services under IRC Section 1031, acting as qualified intermediary and exchange accommodation titleholder.

products.name: Title Insurance Agency Management Services
products.description: Management services provided to title insurance agencies through subsidiary ITMS.

products.name: Investment Management and Trust Services
products.description: Investment management and trust services for individuals, trusts, and entities through Investors Trust Company.
